## 📋 Today's Overview
*April 22, 2026*

### Superconductivity (16 new today)

1. The study focuses on **LaFeAsO**, employing **density functional theory combined with dynamical mean field theory (DFT+DMFT)** to address **the effect of electronic correlations on its magnetic and superconducting gap symmetry**.
2. The study focuses on **a superconducting system coupled to a chiral cavity**, employing **photon exchange with chiral cavity modes** to address **photo-control over a superconducting diode effect via time-reversal symmetry breaking**.
3. The study focuses on **the KTaO₃(111) surface**, employing **Mg-induced surface reduction** to address **the direct fabrication of a clean, superconducting two-dimensional electron gas for spectroscopic study**.
4. The study focuses on **a multimode superconducting ring resonator**, employing **nonlinear circuit electrodynamics** to address **the sensitive probing of time-reversal symmetry breaking in quantum materials**.
5. The study focuses on **multiplexed superconducting qubits**, employing **a single shared Π-filter integrated into the feedline** to address **broadband Purcell protection with minimal hardware overhead**.
6. The study focuses on **Ruddlesden-Popper nickelate thin films**, employing **a review of recent progress** to address **the platform's emergence for unconventional, high-temperature superconductivity**.
7. The study focuses on **hybrid electro- and opto-mechanical systems**, employing **a short review of circuit quantum electrodynamics (cQED)** to address **their fundamentals and applications when coupled to superconducting qubits**.
8. The study focuses on **superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs)**, employing **antenna-coupled nanowires** to address **enhancing mid-infrared detection efficiency and scaling the photon-detection area**.
9. The study focuses on **rhombohedral tetralayer graphene**, employing **the random-phase approximation for density-density interactions** to address **identifying the dominant chiral finite-momentum pairing mechanism**.
10. The study focuses on **YCaHₙ (n=8–20) superhydrides**, employing **density functional theory (DFT) calculations** to address **the effects of metal atom disorder and doping on their high-pressure superconducting properties**.
11. The study focuses on **planar Josephson junctions with Rashba and Dresselhaus spin-orbit coupling**, employing **a symmetry analysis of magnetic and crystalline anisotropies** to address **the conditions for the superconducting diode effect**.
12. The study focuses on **two-dimensional superconductors**, employing **a theoretical framework for the quantum twisting microscope (QTM)** to address **momentum-resolved spectroscopy of the superconducting spectral function**.
13. The study focuses on **the intermediate state of a type-I superconductor (lead)**, employing **ac magnetostriction measurements** to address **revealing the collective resonance dynamics of superconducting/normal domain walls**.
14. The study focuses on **noncentrosymmetric metallic

### spin glass (3 new today)

1. The study focuses on **holographic dualities and spin glasses**, employing **analysis of spectral functions in large N algebras** to address **the conditions for the emergence of semiclassical spacetime and causal horizons**.
2. The study focuses on **ensembles of spherical Boltzmann machines**, employing **replica theory and a duality with ensemble learning** to address **the analytical understanding of performance improvements from sampling multiple models**.
3. The study focuses on **Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problems**, employing **machine-learning-enhanced Monte Carlo methods** to address **demonstrating a consistent performance advantage over state-of-the-art classical solvers**.

## 📄 Paper Details

### Superconductivity

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Magnetism and symmetry of superconducting gap in LaFeAsO from dynamical mean-field theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18582v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>By employing a combined method of density functional theory and dynamical mean field theory (DFT+DMFT) we investigate the effect of electronic correlations on the magnetic and superconducting properties of the iron-based parent compound LaFeAsO. We find that the static non-local susceptibility $χ({\bf q})$ exhibits a peak at the in-plane wave vector ${\mathbf Q}=(π,π)$, which is strongly enhanced upon inclusion of the vertex corrections in the ladder approximation, leading to magnetic instability. Considering the eigenfunctions of the Bethe-Salpeter equation with the vertex, obtained within the second order perturbation theory, as well as the ladder approach containing dynamic interaction vertices, in agreement with earlier weak-coupling-based studies of LaFeAsO, we obtain a close competition between $d$-wave and $s_{\pm}$ order parameters, dominating in the second-order and ladder approach, respectively. We argue that the dominating $s_{\pm}$ instability in the ladder DFT+DMFT approach is related to the reduced degree of magnetic frustration by itinerant degrees of freedom due to only partially formed local magnetic moments. Our study shows that dynamic correlation effects do not change the type of the leading superconducting instability in LaFeAsO.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>通过结合密度泛函理论与动力学平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）的方法，我们研究了电子关联效应对铁基母体化合物LaFeAsO磁性和超导性质的影响。我们发现，静态非局域磁化率$χ({\bf q})$在面内波矢${\mathbf Q}=(π,π)$处出现峰值，该峰值在梯子近似中包含顶点修正后显著增强，从而导致磁不稳定性。考虑在二阶微扰论中获得的、包含顶点的Bethe-Salpeter方程的本征函数，以及包含动态相互作用顶点的梯子方法，我们得到了$d$波和$s_{\pm}$序参量之间的激烈竞争，它们分别在二阶方法和梯子方法中占主导地位。这与早期基于弱耦合理论对LaFeAsO的研究结果一致。我们认为，在梯子DFT+DMFT方法中占主导的$s_{\pm}$不稳定性，与由于局域磁矩仅部分形成、巡游自由度降低了磁挫败程度有关。我们的研究表明，动态关联效应并未改变LaFeAsO中主导超导不稳定性的类型。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | S. L. Skornyakov et al. |
| 2 | **[Photo-induced superconducting diode effect via chiral cavity modes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.17924v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Time reversal symmetry breaking is an important facet of controlling nonreciprocal responses. Here, we propose a method of photo-control over superconducting diode-like nonreciprocities, where time reversal symmetry breaking is achieved via photon exchange with chiral cavity modes. We reveal the origin of the nonreciprocal superconducting response as the embedding of chirality in a many-body ground state through photon induced orbital magnetization. With twisted bilayer graphene (TBG) as an example, we demonstrate the general principles of photo-control of diode responses, which are valid for a wide range of superconductors and cavity designs. The cavity control of superconducting nonreciprocities, particularly in the microwave regime, offers a non-invasive means of exploring new functionalities in quantum circuits with ultrafast switching and on-chip integration. This control method can serve as an important contribution to the toolbox for nonreciprocal models in circuit quantum electrodynamics, primed to be harnessed for scalable and modular quantum devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>时间反演对称性破缺是控制非互易响应的一个重要方面。在此，我们提出了一种通过光控实现类超导二极管非互易性的方法，其中时间反演对称性破缺是通过与手性腔模交换光子实现的。我们揭示了非互易超导响应的根源在于，通过光子诱导的轨道磁化将手性嵌入多体基态。以扭转双层石墨烯（TBG）为例，我们阐述了光控二极管响应的通用原理，这些原理适用于广泛的超导体和腔体设计。对超导非互易性（特别是在微波波段）的腔体控制，为探索量子电路的新功能（如超快切换和片上集成）提供了一种非侵入性手段。这种控制方法可作为电路量子电动力学中非互易模型工具箱的重要补充，有望用于可扩展和模块化的量子器件。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Arpit Arora et al. |
| 3 | **[Direct Fabrication of a Superconducting Two-Dimensional Electron Gas on KTaO3(111) via Mg-Induced Surface Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.18944v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Two-dimensional electron gases (2DEGs) at the surfaces of KTaO3 have become an exciting platform for exploring strong spin-orbit coupling, Rashba physics, and low-carrier-density superconductivity. Yet, a large fraction of reported KTaO3-based 2DEGs has been realized through chemically complex overlayers that both generate carriers and can obscure the native electronic structure, making spectroscopic access to the underlying 2DEG challenging. Here, we demonstrate a simple and direct method to generate a superconducting 2DEG on KTaO3(111) using Mg-induced surface reduction in molecular-beam epitaxy (MBE). Mg has an extremely low sticking coefficient at elevated temperatures, enabling the formation of an ultrathin (less than 1-2 monolayers) MgO layer that is transparent to soft x-ray photoemission spectroscopy (XPS) and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES). This allows direct measurement of the surface chemistry and low-energy electronic structure of the pristine reduced surface without the need for a several-nanometer-thick capping layer. XPS shows clear reduction of Ta5+ to lower oxidation states, while ARPES reveals a parabolic Ta 5d conduction band with an approximately 150 meV bandwidth and additional subband features arising from quantum confinement. Transport measurements confirm a superconducting transition below 0.7 K. Together, these results demonstrate a chemically straightforward and controllable pathway for fabricating spectroscopically accessible superconducting 2DEGs on KTaO3(111), and provide a powerful new platform for investigating the mechanisms underlying orientation-dependent superconductivity in KTaO3-based oxide interfaces.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>KTaO3表面的二维电子气（2DEG）已成为探索强自旋轨道耦合、Rashba物理和低载流子密度超导性的激动人心的平台。然而，已报道的大部分基于KTaO3的二维电子气是通过化学结构复杂的覆盖层实现的，这些覆盖层既能产生载流子，也可能掩盖本征的电子结构，使得对底层二维电子气进行光谱学探测具有挑战性。在此，我们展示了一种在KTaO3(111)上利用分子束外延（MBE）中Mg诱导的表面还原来生成超导二维电子气的简单直接方法。Mg在高温下具有极低的粘附系数，从而能够形成对软X射线光电子能谱（XPS）和角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）透明的超薄（小于1-2个单层）MgO层。这使得无需数纳米厚的覆盖层即可直接测量原始还原表面的表面化学性质和低能电子结构。XPS显示Ta5+被明显还原为较低氧化态，而ARPES则揭示了一个带宽约150 meV的抛物线型Ta 5d导带，以及由量子限域效应产生的额外子带特征。输运测量证实了低于0.7 K的超导转变。这些结果共同证明了一种化学上简单且可控的途径，用于在KTaO3(111)上制备可进行光谱学探测的超导二维电子气，并为研究KTaO3基氧化物界面中与取向相关的超导机制提供了一个强大的新平台。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Chun Sum Brian Pang et al. |
| 4 | **[Probing Time Reversal Symmetry Breaking using a Nonlinear Superconducting Ring Resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.21614v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Time-reversal symmetry breaking (TRSB) has been central to detecting exotic phases of matter. Here, we leverage the circuit electrodynamics capabilities of superconducting devices to propose a novel scheme based on a multimode superconducting ring resonator for sensitive probing of TRSB in quantum materials. A ring resonator enables nonlinear cross-interactions between the modes which act as an built-in amplifiers to be harnessed for enhanced sensing. Using a driven-dissipative model, we explore the nonlinear dynamics of a two-mode superconducting circuit with self- and cross-Kerr nonlinearities under conditions near the bifurcation threshold. By mapping the optimal parameter regimes, we show that even when the photon occupation numbers are subjected to different initial conditions, they can be driven into a symmetric configuration which is broken even with weak TRSB. Through full quantum analysis we demonstrate that the Kerr-nonlinear interactions up-convert the magnetic effects of material-resonator hybrid system, enhancing the probing of TRSB. Our findings highlight the utility of superconducting microwave resonators outside of quantum information processing, as a tool for probing exotic states of matter.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>时间反演对称性破缺（TRSB）一直是探测奇异物相的核心。在此，我们利用超导器件的电路电动力学能力，提出了一种基于多模超导环形谐振器的新方案，用于灵敏探测量子材料中的时间反演对称性破缺。环形谐振器能够实现模式间的非线性交叉相互作用，这些相互作用可作为内置放大器加以利用，以增强传感能力。利用一个驱动-耗散模型，我们探索了在接近分岔阈值条件下，具有自克尔和非交叉克尔非线性的双模超导电路的非线性动力学。通过映射最优参数区间，我们表明，即使光子占据数受到不同的初始条件影响，它们也能被驱动到一个对称构型，而该构型在即使存在微弱时间反演对称性破缺时也会被打破。通过完整的量子分析，我们证明了克尔非线性相互作用能将材料-谐振器混合系统的磁效应上转换，从而增强对时间反演对称性破缺的探测。我们的发现凸显了超导微波谐振器在量子信息处理之外的用途，即作为探测奇异物质态的工具。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Nicolas Dirnegger et al. |
| 5 | **[Engineered broadband Purcell protection using a shared $Π$-filter for multiplexed superconducting qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18387v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We propose a broadband Purcell-protection scheme based on a single shared filter integrated directly into the feedline, enabling simultaneous protection of multiple qubits in a compact architecture with minimal hardware overhead. The filter consists of two open-ended stubs connected by an in-line transmission line, forming a $Π$ geometry, and operates via engineered passive microwave interference that suppresses the real part of the environmental admittance over a wide frequency window. Circuit simulations and finite-element modeling show strong suppression of transmission within the target band (the qubit's frequencies) while preserving the readout and reset modes of the multiplexed architecture. For realistic device parameters, the proposed design yields Purcell-limited relaxation times exceeding $1$ ms over a frequency span of approximately $1.5$ GHz, which can be further extended with straightforward modifications of the design. Our results establish the $Π$-filter as a compact and scalable solution for broadband impedance engineering in superconducting quantum circuits, compatible with standard dispersive readout protocols.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了一种基于直接集成到馈线中的单个共享滤波器的宽带珀塞尔保护方案，能够在硬件开销最小化的紧凑架构中同时保护多个量子比特。该滤波器由两个通过一条直列传输线连接的开路短截线构成，形成$Π$形几何结构，并通过设计的被动微波干涉工作，在宽频率窗口内抑制环境导纳的实部。电路仿真和有限元建模显示，在目标频带（量子比特频率）内传输得到强烈抑制，同时保留了复用架构的读取和重置模式。对于实际的器件参数，所提出的设计能在约1.5 GHz的频率跨度内产生超过1 ms的珀塞尔极限弛豫时间，并且可以通过对设计的直接修改进一步扩展。我们的研究结果确立了$Π$滤波器作为一种紧凑且可扩展的解决方案，用于超导量子电路中的宽带阻抗工程，并与标准的色散读取协议兼容。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Samuel D. Escribano et al. |
| 6 | **[Superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates: a review of recent progress, focusing on thin films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18385v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The discovery of superconductivity with Tc ~ 80 K in the nickelate Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer La3Ni2O7 at high pressure has opened a new platform for unconventional superconductivity, followed by the subsequent observation of superconductivity in trilayer La4Ni3O10, also at high pressure. Remarkably, ambient-pressure superconductivity was also observed recently in La3Ni2O7 ultra-thin films when grown on substrates that provide compressive strain. This discovery significantly extends the type of experimental techniques that can be used in nickelates, previously limited due to the high-pressure constraint. Discussing the similarities and differences among these nickel oxides will provide new insights into understanding the mechanism of high-Tc superconductivity in correlated electron systems. In this paper, we review the experimental and theoretical progress on RuddlesdenPopper nickelates, with emphasis on thin films, and discuss future perspectives and research directions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在高压下于镍酸盐Ruddlesden-Popper双层La3Ni2O7中发现Tc ~ 80 K的超导性，为非常规超导研究开辟了新平台，随后在三层La4Ni3O10中也观测到了高压超导。值得注意的是，最近在提供压缩应变的衬底上生长的La3Ni2O7超薄膜中，也观察到了常压超导性。这一发现极大地扩展了可用于镍酸盐研究的实验技术类型，此前这些技术因高压限制而难以应用。讨论这些镍氧化物的异同，将为理解强关联电子体系中的高温超导机制提供新见解。本文回顾了Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐的实验与理论进展，重点聚焦薄膜体系，并讨论了未来的前景和研究方向。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Yang Zhang et al. |
| 7 | **[Fundamentals and Applications of Hybrid Electroand Opto-mechanical system coupled to Superconducting Qubit: A Short Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18186v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting qubits, realized by incorporating Josephson junctions into superconducting circuits, behave as artificial atoms with anharmonic energy spectra and can be precisely controlled and measured using microwave cavities within the framework of circuit quantum electrodynamics (cQED). Since its emergence in the early 2000s, cQED has established superconducting qubits as leading candidates for scalable quantum devices and has enabled the exploration of hybrid quantum systems that integrate disparate physical platformsThis review surveys superconducting hybrid quantum electromechanical systems in which mechanical resonators are coupled to superconducting qubits, with a focus on two widely used qubit platforms: the transmon and the fluxonium. We provide an overview of the underlying coupling mechanisms arising from interactions through the phase and charge degrees of freedom of the qubit, and discuss how these mechanisms give rise to both longitudinal and transverse qubit-mechanical interactions. We further review extensions of electromechanical platforms to electro-optomechanical architectures, in which optical cavities are integrated to enable coherent interfacing between superconducting circuits and optical photons. This review aims to present a unified framework and perspective on qubit-mechanical and qubit-mechanical-optical hybrid systems in superconducting quantum technologies and applications related to sensors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>通过将约瑟夫森结集成到超导电路中实现的超导量子比特，表现为具有非谐能谱的人工原子，并可在电路量子电动力学框架下利用微波腔进行精确控制和测量。自21世纪初兴起以来，cQED已确立超导量子比特作为可扩展量子器件的主要候选者，并使得探索集成不同物理平台的混合量子系统成为可能。本综述考察了机械谐振器与超导量子比特耦合的超导混合量子机电系统，重点聚焦两种广泛使用的量子比特平台：transmon和fluxonium。我们概述了源于量子比特相位和电荷自由度相互作用的底层耦合机制，并讨论了这些机制如何产生纵向和横向的量子比特-机械相互作用。我们进一步回顾了将机电平台扩展到电光机械架构的进展，其中集成了光学腔以实现超导电路与光学光子之间的相干接口。本综述旨在为超导量子技术及相关传感器应用中的量子比特-机械及量子比特-机械-光学混合系统提供一个统一的框架和视角。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Roson Nongthombam et al. |
| 8 | **[Enhanced Mid-Infrared Single-Photon Detection with Antenna-Coupled Superconducting Nanowires](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18155v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Scaling the photon-detection area of superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs) has traditionally been achieved by nanowire meandering. However, material inhomogeneities and fabrication-induced defects, such as line-edge roughness, increase with nanowire length, leading to reduced internal photon-detection efficiency and elevated dark-count rates. This trade-off becomes increasingly pronounced as nanowires are scaled to sub-100 nm widths and sub-5 nm thicknesses required for mid- to far-infrared sensitivity. Here, we demonstrate an antenna-coupled SNSPD architecture that enhances the effective photon-detection area without increasing nanowire length. A crossed bowtie antenna integrated with an 80 nm-wide, 3 nm-thick WSi nanowire yields 15.7$\times$ increase in effective detection area at 7.4 $μ$m compared to a bare nanowire of identical geometric footprint, while maintaining the same internal detection efficiency and dark-count rate. Antenna coupling improves noise-equivalent power and provides a more scalable route to increasing photon-detection area than conventional meander geometries, offering performance benefits for applications in astronomy, biological imaging, and molecular spectroscopy.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>传统上，超导纳米线单光子探测器的光子探测区域面积扩展是通过纳米线蜿蜒结构实现的。然而，材料不均匀性和制造引入的缺陷（如线边缘粗糙度）会随着纳米线长度的增加而增加，导致内部光子探测效率降低和暗计数率升高。随着纳米线为满足中远红外灵敏度需求而缩小至亚100纳米宽度和亚5纳米厚度，这种权衡变得日益显著。本文展示了一种天线耦合的SNSPD架构，该架构在不增加纳米线长度的前提下增强了有效光子探测面积。一个交叉领结天线与一条80纳米宽、3纳米厚的WSi纳米线集成，在7.4微米波长处，相比具有相同几何占位的裸纳米线，其有效探测面积增加了15.7倍，同时保持了相同的内部探测效率和暗计数率。天线耦合改善了噪声等效功率，并提供了一条比传统蜿蜒几何结构更具可扩展性的增加光子探测面积的途径，为天文学、生物成像和分子光谱学等应用带来了性能优势。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Dip Joti Paul et al. |
| 9 | **[Chiral finite-momentum superconductivity in the tetralayer graphene](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.07145v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Motivated by the recent experimental discovery of superconductivity in rhombohedral tetralayer graphene, we investigate the pairing mechanism arising from the density-density interactions within the random-phase approximation. This approach successfully highlights the dominance of the chiral $p$-wave pairing between electrons with the same spin and valley index at low densities, while also predicting the superconducting range in agreement with experimental findings. Furthermore, we examine the characteristics of distinct superconducting regions: SC1 and SC2 exhibit chiral finite-momentum superconductivity with pronounced phase fluctuations, whereas SC4 displays zero-momentum spin-singlet superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>受最近在菱面体四层石墨烯中发现超导性的实验启发，我们在随机相位近似下研究了由密度-密度相互作用产生的配对机制。该方法成功揭示了在低密度下，具有相同自旋和谷指数的电子之间手性p波配对占主导地位，同时预测的超导范围与实验结果一致。此外，我们考察了不同超导区域的特征：SC1和SC2表现出具有显著相位涨落的手性有限动量超导性，而SC4则表现为零动量自旋单重态超导性。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Qiong Qin et al. |
| 10 | **[Metal Atom (Dis)Order and Superconductivity in YCaH$_{n}$ ($n=8-20$) High-Pressure Superhydrides](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17712v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>High-pressure superhydrides have attracted much attention due to their high superconducting critical temperatures ($T_\text{c}$s). Herein, density functional theory (DFT) calculations are used to study the structures and properties, including potential for metal atom disorder and doping-enhanced $T_\text{c}$, within Y-Ca superhydrides with YCaH$_{n}$ ($n=8-20$) compositions. For YCaH$_8$ numerous phases that differed in the arrangement of the metal atoms were found to be nearly isoenthalpic, suggesting the importance of configurational entropy on stability. The equimolar ratio of the two metal atoms brought the Fermi level to a peak in the density of states, enhancing $T_\text{c}$ to 149~K and 170~K for $P4/mmm$ and $Cmmm$ YCaH$_{8}$, respectively, at 180~GPa within the isotropic Eliashberg formalism. YCaH$_{12}$ was also predicted to be disordered, however the $T_\text{c}$s of the ordered variants spanned a wide range from 105-253~K at 200~GPa, showing that doping could either mildly enhance or drastically reduce $T_\text{c}$ from that of the parent compounds. For YCaH$_{18}$ and YCaH$_{20}$, only a single dynamically stable superhydride was predicted, which we attribute to the differences in the structures of the stable binary parents.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>高压超氢化物因其高超导临界温度而备受关注。本文利用密度泛函理论计算，研究了YCaHn（n=8-20）组成的Y-Ca超氢化物的结构和性质，包括金属原子无序的可能性以及掺杂增强的Tc。对于YCaH8，发现许多金属原子排列不同的相具有近乎相等的焓值，这表明构型熵对稳定性有重要影响。两种金属原子的等摩尔比使费米能级位于态密度峰值处，在各向同性Eliashberg形式下，在180 GPa压力下，将P4/mmm和Cmmm结构的YCaH8的Tc分别提升至149 K和170 K。YCaH12也被预测为无序结构，但其有序变体在200 GPa下的Tc范围很宽（105-253 K），表明掺杂可能轻微增强，也可能从母体化合物的Tc值大幅降低Tc。对于YCaH18和YCaH20，仅预测存在一种动态稳定的超氢化物，我们将其归因于稳定二元母体化合物结构的差异。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Masashi W. Kimura et al. |
| 11 | **[Anisotropic Superconducting Diode Effect in Planar Josephson Junctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17594v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We theoretically investigate the magnetic and crystalline anisotropies of the superconducting diode effect (SDE) in proximitized planar Josephson junctions (JJs) with coexisting Rashba and Dresselhaus spin-orbit couplings (SOCs) under an in-plane magnetic field. A symmetry analysis identifies geometric constraints on magnetic-field and crystallographic orientations for which the SDE is suppressed independently of field strength, providing experimentally testable signatures of the interplay between SOC and Zeeman interaction. We develop a phenomenological model showing that the diode efficiency depends on the relative alignment between spin-orbit and magnetic fields, and corroborate this behavior in the narrow-junction, low-field regime using an analytical approach that links the anisotropy of the diode response to SOC-induced Fermi surface distortions and anisotropic Cooper pair momentum. These findings are supported by tight-binding simulations of the Bogoliubov-de Gennes equation, which reproduce recent experimental trends. The simulations reveal that electrostatic gating can induce polarity reversals of the SDE in the low-field regime even with only Rashba SOC, consistent with recent experiments, and predict additional reversals for specific field orientations, junction geometries, and SOC ratios. Our results elucidate the origin of anisotropic nonreciprocal superconducting transport and provide guidance for experimentally probing the mechanisms underlying the SDE in semiconductor-based planar JJs.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们从理论上研究了在面内磁场下具有共存Rashba和Dresselhaus自旋轨道耦合的近邻平面约瑟夫森结中，超导二极管效应的磁各向异性和晶体各向异性。对称性分析确定了磁场和晶体学取向的几何约束条件，在这些条件下，超导二极管效应被抑制且与场强无关，这为自旋轨道耦合与塞曼相互作用之间的相互影响提供了可实验验证的特征。我们建立了一个唯象模型，表明二极管效率取决于自旋轨道场与磁场之间的相对排列，并在窄结、低场区域使用一种分析方法证实了这种行为，该方法将二极管响应的各向异性与自旋轨道耦合引起的费米面畸变和各向异性库珀对动量联系起来。这些发现得到了Bogoliubov-de Gennes方程的紧束缚模拟的支持，该模拟再现了最近的实验趋势。模拟表明，即使在仅有Rashba自旋轨道耦合的情况下，静电栅压也能在低场区域诱导超导二极管效应的极性反转，这与最近的实验一致，并预测了在特定磁场方向、结几何结构和自旋轨道耦合比例下会出现额外的反转。我们的结果阐明了各向异性非互易超导输运的起源，并为实验探究基于半导体的平面约瑟夫森结中超导二极管效应的潜在机制提供了指导。</p></details> | 2026-04-19 | Abhishek Chilampankunnel Prasannan et al. |
| 12 | **[Momentum-resolved spectroscopy of superconductivity with the quantum twisting microscope](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.13641v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We develop a theoretical framework for probing superconductivity with momentum resolution using the quantum twisting microscope (QTM), a planar tunneling device where a graphene tip is rotated relative to a two-dimensional sample. Because of in-plane momentum conservation, the QTM directly measures the superconducting spectral function along well-defined trajectories in momentum space. The relative intensities of electron and hole excitations encode the Bogoliubov coherence factors, revealing the momentum dependence of the pairing magnitude. Three $C_{3z}$-related tunneling channels enable direct detection of rotational symmetry breaking, as well as nodal points in the superconducting order parameter. We apply our framework to superconductivity within the Bistritzer-MacDonald model of noninteracting electrons and the topological heavy-fermion model, which accounts for electron-electron interactions. Together, these capabilities establish the QTM as a direct probe of the pairing symmetry and microscopic origin of superconductivity in two-dimensional materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们建立了一个理论框架，利用量子扭转显微镜来探测具有动量分辨率的超导电性。量子扭转显微镜是一种平面隧穿器件，其中石墨烯针尖相对于二维样品旋转。由于面内动量守恒，量子扭转显微镜可以直接测量沿动量空间中明确轨迹的超导谱函数。电子和空穴激发的相对强度编码了Bogoliubov相干因子，揭示了配对大小的动量依赖性。三个与$C_{3z}$相关的隧穿通道能够直接检测旋转对称性破缺，以及超导序参量中的节点。我们将该框架应用于非相互作用电子的Bistritzer-MacDonald模型中的超导电性，以及考虑电子-电子相互作用的拓扑重费米子模型中的超导电性。这些能力共同确立了量子扭转显微镜作为直接探测二维材料中超导配对对称性和微观起源的工具。</p></details> | 2026-04-19 | Yuval Waschitz et al. |
| 13 | **[Collective Resonance of Superconducting/Normal Domain Walls in the Intermediate State of type-I superconductor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17333v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The dynamics of phase boundaries, such as superconducting/normal (S/N) interfaces in type-I superconductors, are typically obscured in conventional magnetic measurements, which are dominated by surface barriers and over-damped flux processes. Here, we employ ac magnetostriction as a sensitive probe to reveal the distinct bulk dynamics of these domain walls in the intermediate state of lead. In contrast to the Debye-type relaxation observed in magnetic susceptibility, we discover a pronounced quasiresonant response characterized by a sign reversal of the imaginary component and a non-monotonic evolution of the real part with frequency. We attribute this behavior to the collective oscillations of S/N interfaces driven by eddy currents generated within the normal domains. This work uncovers a fundamental dynamical channel in superconducting modulated phases and establishes ac magnetostrictive coefficient as a powerful tool for probing hidden interface physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>相界（例如I类超导体中的超导/正常界面）的动力学通常在传统的磁测量中被掩盖，这些测量主要受表面势垒和过阻尼磁通过程主导。在这里，我们采用交流磁致伸缩作为一种灵敏的探针，揭示了铅中间态中这些畴壁独特的体动力学。与在磁化率中观察到的德拜型弛豫相反，我们发现了一个显著的准共振响应，其特征是虚部符号反转以及实部随频率的非单调演化。我们将此行为归因于正常畴内产生的涡流所驱动的超导/正常界面的集体振荡。这项工作揭示了超导调制相中的一个基本动力学通道，并确立了交流磁致伸缩系数作为探测隐藏界面物理的强大工具。</p></details> | 2026-04-19 | Mengju Yuan et al. |
| 14 | **[Instability toward Superconducting Stripe Phase in Altermagnets with Strong Rashba Spin-Orbit Coupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.00837v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We numerically investigate finite-momentum superconductivity in noncentrosymmetric metallic altermagnets with $d$-wave spin-splitting and strong Rashba-type spin-orbit coupling. Focusing on a stripe phase in which Cooper pairs acquire multiple center-of-mass momenta, we construct phase diagrams that reveal phase boundaries between the stripe phase and a helical phase characterized by a single center-of-mass momentum. Our results show that the stripe phase emerges at low temperatures and exhibits a reentrant behavior as a function of the strength of the altermagnetic splitting. We further analyze the stripe phase within a linearized gap equation, and uncover the mechanism of the pairing formation unique to the stripe phase. This mechanism originates from the anisotropic deformation of the Fermi surfaces induced by the altermagnetic splitting, highlighting the intriguing interplay between the spin-orbit coupling and the altermagnets.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们数值研究了具有$d$波自旋劈裂和强Rashba型自旋轨道耦合的非中心对称金属交变磁体中的有限动量超导电性。聚焦于库珀对获得多个质心动量的条纹相，我们构建了相图，揭示了条纹相与以单一质心动量为特征的螺旋相之间的相边界。我们的结果表明，条纹相在低温下出现，并作为交变磁体劈裂强度的函数表现出重入行为。我们进一步在线性化能隙方程内分析了条纹相，并揭示了条纹相所特有的配对形成机制。该机制源于交变磁体劈裂引起的费米面各向异性形变，突显了自旋轨道耦合与交变磁体之间有趣的相互作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-18 | Kohei Mukasa et al. |
| 15 | **[Unified topological phase diagram of quantum Hall and superconducting vortex-lattice states](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.00108v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present the global topological phase diagram of a two-dimensional electron gas placed in a quantizing magnetic field and proximitized by a superconducting vortex lattice. Our theory allows for arbitrary ratios of the pairing amplitude, magnetic field, and chemical potential. By analyzing the Bogoliubov--de Gennes Hamiltonian, we show that the resulting phase diagram is highly nontrivial, featuring a plethora of topological superconducting phases with chiral edge modes of quasiparticles. Landau-level mixing plays an essential role in our theory: even in the weak-pairing limit, it generically splits the integer quantum Hall transition lines into a sequence of transitions with larger Chern number jumps of both signs protected by the symmetries of the superconducting vortex lattice. Interestingly, we find that weak pairing induces trivial or topological superconductivity when chemical potential is tuned to a Landau level energy, depending on the Landau level index.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了放置在量子化磁场中并被超导涡旋晶格近邻化的二维电子气的全局拓扑相图。我们的理论允许配对振幅、磁场和化学势的任意比例。通过分析Bogoliubov-de Gennes哈密顿量，我们表明所得的相图高度非平凡，具有大量带有准粒子手性边缘模式的拓扑超导相。朗道能级混合在我们的理论中起着至关重要的作用：即使在弱配对极限下，它通常也会将整数量子霍尔跃迁线分裂成一系列跃迁，这些跃迁具有由超导涡旋晶格对称性保护的、更大且符号可正可负的陈数跳跃。有趣的是，我们发现，当化学势调谐到朗道能级能量时，弱配对会诱导出平庸的或拓扑的超导电性，具体取决于朗道能级指数。</p></details> | 2026-04-17 | Daniil S. Antonenko et al. |
| 16 | **[Nonequilibrium Cooper quartet generation in superconducting devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16647v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Cooper quartets are aggregates of four electrons that generalize the concept of Cooper pairs, and their study can unfold unexplored perspectives in correlated matter and many-body physics. We propose a method to isolate them in a double-quantum-dot system coupled to conventional superconducting and normal leads. By driving the system out of equilibrium, we show that a resonance between the vacuum $|0\rangle$ and the four-electron state $|4e\rangle$ emerges in the high bias voltage regime, which involves a two-Cooper pair exchange process and is characterized by finite quartet correlations. We study the transport properties of the system and show that a peak in the Andreev current at high bias voltage has a width that scales with the magnitude of the quartet coupling $Γ_{4e}$, which can be tuned by the phase of additional superconducting leads, yielding distinctive signatures. By further studying the current-current correlations and the Fano factor, we establish a regime characterized by equal auto- and cross-correlations, which we interpret as a definitive signature of fast coherent two-Cooper-pair oscillations between the dots and the superconducting leads. The proposed platform, experimentally accessible in a quantum solid-state laboratory, enables exploration of quartet correlations and multifermion-correlated states of matter.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>库珀四重态是四个电子的集合体，它推广了库珀对的概念，对其研究可揭示关联物质和多体物理学中尚未探索的视角。我们提出了一种在耦合了常规超导引线和正常引线的双量子点系统中隔离它们的方法。通过驱动系统远离平衡态，我们表明在高偏压区域会出现真空态$|0\rangle$与四电子态$|4e\rangle$之间的共振，该共振涉及双库珀对交换过程，并以有限的四重态关联为特征。我们研究了系统的输运特性，并表明高偏压下的安德烈夫电流峰值具有一个宽度，该宽度与四重态耦合强度$Γ_{4e}$的大小成比例缩放，而$Γ_{4e}$可通过附加超导引线的相位进行调节，从而产生独特的特征信号。通过进一步研究电流-电流关联和法诺因子，我们确立了一个以自关联与互关联相等为特征的区域，我们将其解释为量子点与超导引线之间快速相干的双库珀对振荡的确切特征。所提出的平台在量子固态实验室中具有实验可行性，可用于探索四重态关联以及物质的多费米子关联态。</p></details> | 2026-04-17 | Luca Chirolli et al. |
| 17 | **[Laser induced surface nitriding of niobium: phase evolution and superconducting behaviour](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15981v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Laser nitriding represents a versatile approach for tailoring the surface properties of metals. Up to now, its effect on the superconducting response of niobium nitrides remains largely unexplored. In this work, the nitriding process of niobium by laser irradiation under a controlled nitrogen atmosphere up to 2.50 bar, using a nanosecond pulsed laser with wavelength of 1064 nm has been investigated. By independently tuning the nitrogen pressure, the two-dimensional accumulated fluence ($F_{2D}$) and the laser irradiance, a laser-processing map for the formation of either a combination of $β$-Nb$_2$N (hexagonal) and $γ$-Nb$_4$N$_{3\pm x}$ (tetragonal) phases or only the $β$-phase has been established. Systematic analysis by X-ray diffraction, scanning electron microscopy and electron backscatter diffraction revealed that the nitrogen-rich $γ$-phase forms in the near-surface layer through melting when $F_{2D}$ exceeds a certain value ($> 50 \,\mathrm{kJ/cm^2}$ at 2.50 bar). A $β$-layer is observed underneath, and further inside, there is a band of embedded $β$-grains in the Nb matrix. Their size gradually decreases with increasing distance to surface, suggesting thermal gradients and a diffusion formation mechanism. When the $γ$-phase becomes predominant, a significant increase in the superconducting critical temperature is observed, up to $T_c \approx 15\,\mathrm{K}$, and magnetic irreversibility. For low $F_{2D}$ values ($\approx 7.5 \,\mathrm{kJ/cm^2}$ at 1.50-2.50 bar), the formation of a uniform nitride layer composed of sub-micron-sized $β$-Nb$_2$N grains results in a ca. fourfold enhancement in surface microhardness. These findings provide fundamental insights into laser-induced nitriding of niobium to engineer mechanically robust and superconducting Nb-N layers.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>激光氮化是一种调控金属表面性能的通用方法。迄今为止，其对氮化铌超导响应的影响在很大程度上仍未得到探索。本研究利用波长为1064纳米的纳秒脉冲激光，在最高2.50巴的受控氮气氛围下，研究了铌的激光氮化过程。通过独立调节氮气压力、二维累积能量密度（$F_{2D}$）和激光辐照度，建立了形成$β$-Nb$_2$N（六方）与$γ$-Nb$_4$N$_{3\pm x}$（四方）相组合或仅形成$β$相的激光加工图。通过X射线衍射、扫描电子显微镜和电子背散射衍射的系统分析表明，当$F_{2D}$超过一定值（在2.50巴下$> 50 \,\mathrm{kJ/cm^2}$）时，富氮的$γ$相通过熔融在近表层形成。其下方观察到$β$层，更深处则是在铌基体中嵌有一带$β$晶粒。这些晶粒的尺寸随着与表面距离的增加而逐渐减小，表明存在温度梯度和扩散形成机制。当$γ$相占主导时，观察到超导临界温度显著升高，最高达$T_c \approx 15\,\mathrm{K}$，并出现磁不可逆性。对于较低的$F_{2D}$值（在1.50-2.50巴下$\approx 7.5 \,\mathrm{kJ/cm^2}$），形成由亚微米尺寸$β$-Nb$_2$N晶粒组成的均匀氮化物层，导致表面显微硬度提高约四倍。这些发现为通过激光诱导氮化铌来设计机械坚固且具有超导性的Nb-N层提供了基础性见解。</p></details> | 2026-04-17 | J. Frechilla et al. |
| 18 | **[Proximity-induced superconductivity and emerging topological phases in altermagnet-based heterostructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.26894v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present a theoretical framework for investigating superconducting proximity effect in altermagnet (AM)-superconductor (SC) heterostructures. In general, AMs, characterized by vanishing net magnetization but spin-split electronic spectra, provide a promising platform for realizing unconventional magnetic phases. We consider a two-dimensional $d$-wave AM proximity coupled to a three dimensional ordinary $s$-wave SC. By integrating out the superconducting degrees of freedom, we derive an effective Hamiltonian that describes the proximity-induced modifications in the AM layer in the form of a self-energy. We then derive an effective Green's function to obtain the proximity-induced pairing amplitudes in the AM layer and classify the induced pairing amplitudes according to their parity, frequency, and spin. We find the presence of even-parity singlet and triplet pairing amplitudes in the AM layer. To achieve the odd-parity triplet components, important to realize topological superconductivity, we introduce a layer of Rashba spin-orbit coupling (RSOC) in the heterostructure. We analyse the band topology of this proximity-induced AM-RSOC layer and demonstrate the emergence of both weak and strong topological superconducting phases with edge-localized modes, characterized by winding number and Chern number. These findings highlight the role of AM-SC hybrid setup as a versatile platform for realizing odd-parity triplet pairings and engineering topological superconductivity in two-dimension.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了一个研究交替磁体-超导体异质结构中超导邻近效应的理论框架。一般而言，交替磁体具有净磁化强度为零但电子能谱自旋分裂的特征，为实现非常规磁性相提供了一个有前景的平台。我们考虑一个二维$d$波交替磁体与一个三维常规$s$波超导体邻近耦合。通过积分掉超导自由度，我们推导出一个有效哈密顿量，以自能的形式描述了交替磁体层中由邻近效应引起的修正。随后，我们推导出一个有效格林函数以获得交替磁体层中邻近效应诱导的配对振幅，并根据其宇称、频率和自旋对诱导的配对振幅进行分类。我们发现交替磁体层中存在偶宇称单态和三态配对振幅。为了实现奇宇称三态分量（这对实现拓扑超导性至关重要），我们在异质结构中引入了一层Rashba自旋轨道耦合。我们分析了这一邻近效应诱导的AM-RSOC层的能带拓扑，并论证了具有边缘局域模的弱和强拓扑超导相的出现，这些相由绕数和陈数表征。这些发现凸显了AM-SC混合结构作为实现奇宇称三态配对和设计二维拓扑超导性的通用平台的作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-17 | Ohidul Alam et al. |
| 19 | **[Digital Predistortion for Flux Control of Tunable Superconducting Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15895v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Flux-tunable superconducting qubits rely on fast flux control pulses to implement two-qubit entangling quantum gates, a key building block for quantum algorithms. However, distortion effects introduced by non-ideal control electronics, parasitic components, and the cryogenic quantum chip response can all degrade the gate fidelity. We present a digital predistortion (DPD) framework for characterizing and then compensating for these distortions using a combination of infinite impulse response (IIR) and finite impulse response (FIR) filters. Experiments on a flux-tunable quantum processing unit (QPU) demonstrate a successful correction of step-response distortions on the flux-control line, with a compensated control signal showing only sub-percent deviations from the ideal target linear behavior. The demonstrated method enables automated rapid calibration of flux control channels for superconducting QPUs.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>磁通可调超导量子比特依赖于快速磁通控制脉冲来实现两量子比特纠缠量子门，这是量子算法的关键构建模块。然而，非理想控制电子设备、寄生元件以及低温量子芯片响应引入的失真效应都会降低门的保真度。我们提出了一种数字预失真框架，结合使用无限脉冲响应和有限脉冲响应滤波器来表征并补偿这些失真。在磁通可调量子处理单元上进行的实验表明，成功校正了磁通控制线上的阶跃响应失真，补偿后的控制信号与理想目标线性行为的偏差仅为亚百分比水平。所演示的方法实现了超导QPU磁通控制通道的自动化快速校准。</p></details> | 2026-04-17 | Dharun Venkateswaran et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Searching for emergent spacetime in spin glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.20902v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent work on algebraic formulations of holographic dualities in terms of large $N$ algebras has revealed a deep connection between the properties of the associated spectral functions and the emergence of a semiclassical spacetime and causal horizons therein. One of the main lessons is that, for a radial direction to emerge, the spectral function has to exhibit non-compact support. Furthermore, there exist conjectures upon a possible duality between complex gravitational configurations and glassy systems. The goal of this paper is to combine these ideas by studying many-body quantum-mechanical systems and assess in which parameter regimes they could potentially be holographic. Thus, we compute the spectral functions of three many-body systems with quenched disorder, the SYK model, the $p$-spin model and the SU$(M)$ Heisenberg chain in the large $N$ limit and present results in different parameter regimes. Our main finding is that in the quantum spin glass phase of the SU$(M)$ Heisenberg model, the spectral function develops an exponential tail, similar to the large $q$ limit of SYK. Furthermore, we demonstrate the presence of an infinite family of quasiparticle excitations deep in the spin liquid phase of the $p$-spin model, which could point towards an emergent type I von Neumann algebra. In addition, we demonstrate the presence of an exponential tail in the spectral function for all cases without compact support and conformal symmetry. Motivated by this observation, we prove that no low-energy operator can detect a nontrivial bulk causal structure, if the spectral function has exponentially decaying tails.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期关于全息对偶性代数表述（基于大N代数）的研究揭示了相关谱函数性质与半经典时空及其因果视界涌现之间的深刻联系。一个重要启示是：为使径向维度涌现，谱函数必须具有非紧支撑。此外，存在关于复杂引力构型与玻璃态系统可能对偶性的猜想。本文旨在融合这些思想，通过研究多体量子力学系统并评估其在何种参数范围内可能具有全息性。为此，我们计算了三种具有淬火无序的多体系统（SYK模型、p-自旋模型和大N极限下的SU(M)海森堡链）的谱函数，并展示了不同参数区间的结果。主要发现是：在SU(M)海森堡模型的量子自旋玻璃相中，谱函数会产生指数衰减尾，类似于SYK模型的大q极限。此外，我们证明了在p-自旋模型的自旋液体相深处存在无限族的准粒子激发，这可能指向一类涌现的I型冯·诺依曼代数。另外，我们证明了在所有不具备紧支撑与共形对称性的情况下，谱函数均存在指数衰减尾。基于此观察，我们证明：若谱函数具有指数衰减尾，则任何低能算子都无法探测到非平凡的体因果结构。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Dimitris Saraidaris et al. |
| 2 | **[Replica Theory of Spherical Boltzmann Machine Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17936v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Training in machine learning generally consists in finding one model, whose parameters minimize a data-dependent loss. Yet, empirical work shows that ensemble learning, an approach in which multiple models are sampled, can improve performance. Here, we provide an analytical framework to understand these observations in the case of Boltzmann machines, exploiting a duality between ensemble learning and large deviations of the free energy in spin-glass models. Replica calculations allow us to fully solve the case of spherical Boltzmann machine ensembles, and clarify when ensemble learning improves over standard loss minimization. Our findings are corroborated by numerical simulations on deep networks. Special care is brought to the case of nearly finite-dimensional data, for which we show that replica predictions are valid for arbitrarily large number of data points compared to the (large) embedding dimension.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>机器学习训练通常旨在寻找一个能最小化数据相关损失的模型参数。然而实证研究表明，集成学习（即对多个模型进行采样的方法）能提升性能。本文针对玻尔兹曼机提出一个分析框架，利用集成学习与自旋玻璃模型中自由能大偏差之间的对偶关系来理解这些现象。通过复本计算，我们完整求解了球形玻尔兹曼机集成的情形，并阐明了集成学习在何时优于标准损失最小化方法。我们的发现得到了深度网络数值模拟的验证。针对近似有限维数据的情形，我们特别论证了：当数据点数量相对于（较大的）嵌入维度任意大时，复本预测仍然有效。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Thomas Tulinski et al. |
| 3 | **[Demonstrating Real Advantage of Machine-Learning-Enhanced Monte Carlo for Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.19544v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Combinatorial optimization problems are central to both practical applications and the development of optimization methods. While classical and quantum algorithms have been refined over decades, machine learning--assisted approaches are comparatively recent and have not yet consistently outperformed simple, state-of-the-art classical methods. Here, we focus on a class of Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problems, specifically the challenge of finding minimum energy configurations in three-dimensional Ising spin glasses. We use a Global Annealing Monte Carlo algorithm that integrates standard local moves with global moves proposed via machine learning. We show that local moves play a crucial role in achieving optimal performance. Benchmarking against Simulated Annealing and Population Annealing, we demonstrate that Global Annealing not only surpasses the performance of Simulated Annealing but also exhibits greater robustness than Population Annealing, maintaining effectiveness across problem hardness and system size without hyperparameter tuning. These results provide clear and robust evidence that a machine learning--assisted optimization method can exceed the capabilities of classical state-of-the-art techniques in a combinatorial optimization setting.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>组合优化问题在实践应用和优化方法发展中均处于核心地位。尽管经典与量子算法历经数十年发展已日趋完善，但机器学习辅助方法相对较新，且尚未能稳定超越简单的经典前沿方法。本文聚焦于一类二次无约束二进制优化问题，特别是三维伊辛自旋玻璃中寻找最小能量构型的挑战。我们采用一种全局退火蒙特卡洛算法，该算法将标准局部移动与通过机器学习提出的全局移动相结合。研究表明，局部移动对实现最优性能至关重要。通过与模拟退火和群体退火进行基准测试，我们证明全局退火不仅性能超越模拟退火，而且比群体退火更具鲁棒性——无需超参数调优即可在不同问题难度和系统规模下保持有效性。这些结果为机器学习辅助优化方法在组合优化场景中能够超越经典前沿技术提供了清晰而坚实的证据。</p></details> | 2026-04-19 | Luca Maria Del Bono et al. |
| 4 | **[Dynamics of spin glasses in two dimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13480v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Spin glass dynamics is a strong function of spatial dimensionality $D$. The lower critical dimension is close to 2.5, so that, in two dimensions, the condensation temperature $T_\text{g}=0$, and only fluctuations are present at finite temperatures. However, by using thin film multilayers, one can explore the dynamics in both $D=3$ and $D=2$ dimensions. Spin glass thin film multilayers transition from $D=3$ dynamics at short to intermediate times to $D = 2$ dynamics at long times. Correlation lengths of CuMn 4.5 nm multilayers at long times are shown to be grow more rapidly in $D=2$ as compared to $D=3$, and for the longest measurement time, experimentally reach equilibrium in qualitative agreement with simulations.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>自旋玻璃动力学是空间维度$D$的强函数。其下临界维度接近2.5，因此在二维情况下，凝聚温度$T_\text{g}=0$，有限温度下仅存在涨落。然而，通过使用薄膜多层结构，可以同时探索$D=3$和$D=2$维度的动力学。自旋玻璃薄膜多层结构的动力学在短到中等时间尺度上表现为$D=3$特性，而在长时间尺度上过渡到$D=2$特性。研究表明，CuMn 4.5 nm多层结构在长时间尺度下的关联长度在$D=2$中比在$D=3$中增长得更快，并且在最长的测量时间内，实验上达到了平衡，这与模拟结果在定性上一致。</p></details> | 2026-04-17 | Hongze Li et al. |
| 5 | **[The Phase Transitions in a $p$ spin Glass Model: A Numerical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15433v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the balanced $M=4$, $p=4$ spin-glass model for a one-dimensional long-range proxy for the finite dimensional short-range $p$-spin glass model to examine the nature of the glass transition beyond mean-field theory. We perform large-scale Monte Carlo equilibrated simulations for both fully connected and power-law diluted versions of the model. The critical temperatures extracted from the finite-size scaling (FSS) analysis of spin-glass susceptibility are in good agreement with theoretical predictions for $σ= 0, 0.25$, and 0.55. For these values of the long-range exponent $σ$ (which is the power of the decrease of the interactions between the spins with their separation), one might have expected that mean-field theory would provide a good description of the system. However, the spin-overlap distribution and the value of the $λ$-parameter do not provide numerical evidence for a one-step replica symmetry breaking (1RSB) phase transition. Instead, our results indicate a direct transition from the paramagnetic state to a full replica symmetry broken phase, with a renormalized value of $λ\equiv ω_2/ω_1 < 1$ suggesting a continuous FRSB transition, despite this ratio being equal to 2 at mean-field level. A value of $λ> 1$ is required for the discontinuous 1RSB transition. We argue that strong finite-size effects and closely spaced transition temperatures remove the expected 1RSB transition for the system sizes which we can study. For values of the exponent $σ= 0.85$, which roughly corresponds to a three dimensional system, we find that the renormalized value of $λ$ is again less than 1, with no signs of either the 1RSB transition or the continuous FRSB transition, suggesting that the Kauzmann temperature $T_K$ in three dimensions might be zero and the complete absence of phase transitions in structural glasses.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究平衡的$M=4$、$p=4$自旋玻璃模型，将其作为有限维短程$p$-自旋玻璃模型的一维长程代理模型，以探究超越平均场理论的玻璃转变本质。我们对模型的完全连接版本和幂律稀释版本进行了大规模蒙特卡洛平衡模拟。从自旋玻璃磁化率的有限尺寸标度分析中提取的临界温度，与$σ=0$、$0.25$和$0.55$情况下的理论预测吻合良好。对于这些长程指数$σ$（它表征自旋间相互作用随距离衰减的幂次）值，人们可能预期平均场理论能很好地描述该系统。然而，自旋重叠分布和$λ$参数值并未为一步复本对称破缺相变提供数值证据。相反，我们的结果表明系统直接从顺磁态转变为完全复本对称破缺相，重整化的$λ\equiv ω_2/ω_1 < 1$值暗示了一个连续的FRSB转变，尽管该比值在平均场水平上等于2。不连续的1RSB转变需要$λ > 1$。我们认为，强烈的有限尺寸效应和紧密相邻的转变温度，在我们所能研究的系统尺寸范围内，消除了预期的1RSB转变。对于指数$σ=0.85$（大致对应于三维系统）的情况，我们发现重整化的$λ$值再次小于1，且没有出现1RSB转变或连续FRSB转变的迹象，这表明三维情况下的考兹曼温度$T_K$可能为零，并且结构玻璃中完全不存在相变。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | Prerak Gupta et al. |
| 6 | **[Spinon mediation of witness spin dynamics in herbertsmithite](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.11678v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The kagome lattice of spin-1/2 copper atoms in herbertsmithite is conjectured to sustain a quantum spin liquid state with spinon quasiparticles. Ideally, the kagome crystal planes are each separated by a plane of spinless zinc atoms. However, in real crystals some spin-1/2 copper atoms substitute randomly onto these inter-kagome zinc sites. Here we reconceptualize such 'impurity' atoms as quantum witness spins whose dynamics is designed to probe the spin liquid state. We then introduce spin noise spectroscopy to measure the frequency and temperature dependence of witness spin dynamics, demonstrating that their phenomenology is consistent with extensive interactions between witness spins mediated by propagation of spinons through a quantum spin liquid. Ultimately, a sharp transition occurs at around 260 mK, below which the properties of both spin noise and magnetic susceptibility suggest that the witness spins form a spin glass phase. Among theoretical models considered, we demonstrate that our observations are only consistent with spinon-mediated interactions between witness spins by either a Z2 or U(1) quantum spin liquid, with the former model more closely matching the data. Our work demonstrates that quantum mechanical witness spins may now conceivably be used as a widely applicable probe of quantum spin liquid physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>赫伯特史密斯石中自旋-1/2铜原子构成的笼目晶格被推测可维持具有自旋子准粒子的量子自旋液体态。理想情况下，笼目晶格平面之间由一层无自旋的锌原子平面分隔。然而，在实际晶体中，部分自旋-1/2铜原子会随机取代这些笼目层间的锌位点。本研究将这些"杂质"原子重新概念化为量子见证自旋，其动力学被设计用于探测自旋液体态。我们随后引入自旋噪声谱技术来测量见证自旋动力学的频率与温度依赖性，证明其现象学符合通过量子自旋液体中自旋子传播介导的见证自旋间广泛相互作用。最终在约260毫K处发生急剧转变，低于该温度时，自旋噪声与磁化率的特性均表明见证自旋形成了自旋玻璃相。在考察的理论模型中，我们证明观测结果仅与Z2或U(1)量子自旋液体介导的见证自旋间自旋子相互作用相符，其中前者模型与数据吻合更佳。我们的工作表明，量子力学见证自旋如今可被视为一种广泛适用的量子自旋液体物理探测工具。</p></details> | 2026-04-16 | Hiroto Takahashi et al. |
